Name: Printing Legion
Purpose: To print the 3D case (the price is estimated from my previous experience in printing case)

Name: Screw
Purpose: To connect the bottom and top part of the case

Name: 1x40 Pin 2.0mm Male Single Row Header Strip
Purpose: For the pin connection; so that I can input the data to the microcontroller

Name: Push Button
Purpose: Directing the game character (left, right, forward)
